prefill.notes: Values come from the real A100 smoke run captured before the PaLU load step failed.

decode.notes: Only the baseline smoke decode measurement completed in the checked-in A100 run.

unaligned.reason: The historical A100 PaLU run failed during model loading before any unaligned PaLU prefill latency was recorded.

aligned_gac.reason: No completed repo-tracked PaLU+Repair A100 prefill run is checked in yet.

unaligned.reason: The historical A100 PaLU run failed during model loading before any unaligned PaLU decode latency was recorded.

aligned_gac.reason: No completed repo-tracked PaLU+Repair A100 decode run is checked in yet.

baseline.notes: The uncompressed baseline serves as the aligned reference.

unaligned.reason: The checked-in PaLU A100 evidence bundle does not yet include a completed run or a repo-tracked extracted alignment ratio for this exact benchmark.

aligned_gac.reason: The checked-in PaLU A100 evidence bundle does not yet include a completed PaLU+Repair run for this exact benchmark.

notes: This file normalizes the currently available PaLU evidence into the same baseline / unaligned / aligned_gac comparison shape used by other method artifacts.
Unlike ASVD and LLM-Pruner, the current PaLU entries are still partial because the only checked-in A100 run failed before the PaLU and PaLU+Repair benchmarks completed.
Once a full run succeeds, these missing entries should be replaced by measured values exported from comparison_summary.json.
